title: Step 1: Create a New ImageOp Object
description:
Step 1: Create a New ImageOp Object

Step 1: Create a New ImageOp object

	Click the [All Tools] the  [New
	 ImageOp] button on the Vision Guide Toolbar.
	Move the mouse over the image display.  You will
	 see the mouse pointer change to the ImageOp object icon.
	Continue to move the mouse until the icon is at the
	 desired position in the image display, then click the left mouse button
	 to create the object.
	Notice that a name for the
	 object is automatically created. In the example, it is called "ImgOp01"
	 because this is the first ImageOp object created for this sequence.
	  (We will explain how to change the name later.)
